track: Python ADK first-party research determinism harness

rows.requirement: Require deterministic action proof for research verbs before the recipe may project a result.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: callbacks planned for action proof capture points
Runner planned for replay-only turn boundaries
Evaluation planned for fixture assertions
rows.notes: Digest-safe row for action evidence names only; first-party research recipe owns verb semantics.

rows.requirement: Require opened source proof with snapshot, digest, timestamp, and span metadata.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: ArtifactService planned for local snapshot handles
SessionService planned for fixture-scoped source ledger
callbacks planned for opened-source proof capture
rows.notes: Digest-safe row records handles and spans only; no page bodies or local paths are projected.

rows.requirement: Reject citations that only provide a URL-shaped string without opened-source proof.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: Evaluation planned for rejection fixture
callbacks planned for citation gate inputs
rows.notes: Research final gate should require evidence handles, not link text alone.

rows.requirement: Reject source references that were discovered but not opened in the research evidence ledger.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: SessionService planned for opened-state ledger
Evaluation planned for unopened-source rejection
rows.notes: Discovery evidence is not enough for claim support until the source is opened in the recipe harness.

rows.requirement: Reject source proof outside the allowed freshness window for the claim context.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: callbacks planned for clock evidence capture
Evaluation planned for stale-source fixture
rows.notes: Freshness policy remains recipe-owned and is represented by deterministic fixture times.

rows.requirement: Map each answer claim to supporting source proof nodes before final projection.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: ArtifactService planned for claim graph artifact handles
Evaluation planned for support coverage checks
rows.notes: Projection should include only claim ids, evidence ids, and digest-safe support status.

rows.requirement: Downgrade weakly supported claims rather than presenting them as confirmed.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: Evaluation planned for downgrade verdicts
callbacks planned for final gate repair hints
rows.notes: Recipe gate owns the confidence label transition from confirmed to qualified.

rows.requirement: Block unsupported claims from final research projection.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: Evaluation planned for unsupported-claim block fixtures
callbacks planned for before-final-output gate
rows.notes: Only claim ids and reason codes are exposed in public projections.

rows.requirement: Extract user-visible acceptance criteria into deterministic research task checks.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: Runner planned for replay-only request envelope
Evaluation planned for criteria extraction fixtures
rows.notes: Criteria text should be normalized into ids and brief digest-safe labels.

rows.requirement: Require completion proof that each acceptance criterion was satisfied or explicitly blocked.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: SessionService planned for criterion status ledger
Evaluation planned for completion proof checks
rows.notes: Completion proof is a digest-safe checklist of criterion ids, statuses, and evidence handles.

rows.requirement: Accept child research output only when it arrives as a structured evidence envelope.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: Runner planned for local child replay fixtures
SessionService planned for child envelope handoff
ArtifactService planned for envelope artifact handles
rows.notes: Child evidence is accepted by envelope schema and digest handles, not by prose alone.

rows.requirement: Reject child research summaries that lack structured evidence envelope fields.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: Runner planned for local child replay fixtures
Evaluation planned for child summary rejection
rows.notes: Unstructured child prose cannot satisfy research evidence requirements.

rows.requirement: Keep intermediate synthesis as an internal research artifact until support checks pass.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: ArtifactService planned for internal synthesis artifact handles
callbacks planned for projection boundary checks
rows.notes: Intermediate synthesis must not be delivered or projected as final output.

rows.requirement: Project only final digest-safe research output after all deterministic gates pass.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: callbacks planned for final projection gate
Evaluation planned for projection boundary fixtures
rows.notes: Final projection contains answer text, citation handles, claim status, and no acquisition payloads.

rows.requirement: Represent repair actions and their results before retrying or blocking research projection.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: callbacks planned for repair verdict capture
FunctionTool exposure planned only through ToolHost-mediated fake local repair fixtures; direct ADK tool execution rejected
Evaluation planned for repair outcome assertions
rows.notes: Repair rows record action ids, result ids, and reason codes without live dispatch; ToolHost remains the only tool boundary.

rows.requirement: Keep all authority, provider, browser, and delivery flags default-off for PR0.
rows.activationGate: default-off local-only fake-provider matrix row; live web, browser, provider, model, and delivery activation blocked
adkPrimitives: Evaluation used for docs-only matrix validation
Runner not used in PR0
FunctionTool and LongRunningFunctionTool not used in PR0; future exposure must be ToolHost-mediated and direct ADK tool execution rejected
rows.notes: PR0 is fixture validation only; any live-capable authority remains unattached.
